splits.title: The Social Worker in the Unemployment Emergency
splits.author: Annie D. Palmer
splits.start_boundary: The Social Worker in the Unemployment Emergency By Annie D. Palmer AMONG
splits.end_boundary: By the spirit with which we bring men through a crisis must we measure the success of our job.

splits.title: By My Fruits
splits.author: Bertha A. Kleinman
splits.start_boundary: By My Fruits By Bertha A. Kleinman What shall it count that my
splits.end_boundary: Who buds with Truth the branch that is my own!

files.notes: This file contains two distinct works: a substantial article about social work during the unemployment emergency by Annie D. Palmer, followed by a short poem by Bertha A. Kleinman. The split is clear and matches the table of contents entries.
